title: Backend PHP Developer
description: CapsLock builds exceptional IT marketing solutions for large partners from North America. We create a unique marketing platform to deliver high-quality service in different industries. Role Overview CapsLock is looking to hire an outstanding Backend PHP Developer with solid technical skills to support all current projects and create new ones. You'll be involved in a spectrum of development practices, from cultivating high-level design to the specifics of software implementation. We have a great IT team with a strong development background to improve your skills and share your knowledge. Responsibilities Researching, designing, implementing, and managing software programs. Testing and evaluating new programs. Identifying areas for modification in existing programs and subsequently developing these modifications. Producing clean, efficient code based on specifications. Integrating software components and third-party programs. Determining operational practicality. Developing quality assurance procedures. Deploying software tools, processes, and metrics. Maintaining and upgrading existing systems. Verifying and deploying programs and systems. Recommending and executing improvements. Creating technical documentation for reference and reporting. Working closely with other developers, designers, business and systems analysts to achieve the best result. Requirements: Skills & Background: 3+ years of professional development experience in PHP. Solid knowledge of OOP, design patterns, and layered architecture. Proficiency in writing PHP code (7.4+). Expertise in Symfony PHP framework. Strong experience in SQL with MySQL/PostgreSQL. Experience with designing software architecture. Comfortable working with Git in Git-based workflows. Conversational English level. Strong communication skills, mainly written (as a remote company, we heavily emphasize written communication across all departments). Nice to Have: A proactive approach to problem-solving. A positive attitude and entrepreneurial spirit. Frontend development experience. Experience in TDD, DDD. Familiarity with Docker, *nix systems, and shell scripting. Why do we deserve your attention? Not only do we offer fair and competitive pay, but we also provide perks and benefits that support your well-being and growth. Here are some of them: Remote Work We are a truly remote-first company. You choose where you feel the most productive and comfortable to make an impact. Paid Time Off Work-life balance matters to us, and we support it with paid time off for rest, personal time, or simply doing what makes you happy. Ongoing Learning We believe in curiosity and growth. That’s why we support continuous learning with workshops, online courses, conferences, and certifications. Home Office We help you set up your perfect workspace by covering equipment and furniture expenses, so you can do your best work from home. Physical Well-Being From gym memberships and yoga classes to home workout equipment or even a bicycle, we give you the flexibility to stay active your way. Unlimited Sick Days Your health matters. Take the time you need to rest and recover - we’ll be here when you’re ready to return. Medical Coverage We support you and your family with reimbursement for medical insurance and health-related expenses, including dental care and psychological support. Co-Working Space If you sometimes crave a change of scenery or more social interaction, we’ll cover the full cost of a co-working space. Fun Stuff From gaming nights and fitness challenges to annual retreats at world-class resorts, we make sure there’s never a shortage of fun and connection.

title: Backend Engineer - REMOTE
description: Talenthaus, Türkiye'nin en iyi teknoloji yetenekleri ile sektöründe öncü teknoloji şirketlerini buluşturarak anlamlı ilişkiler kuran ve kariyer gelişimleri sağlayan yetenek platformudur. Platformumuzda, 60'tan fazla teknolojide uzman mühendislerle profesyonel olarak büyüyor, anlamlı ilişkiler kuruyor ve yaptığımız işi her gün daha keyifli hale getiriyoruz. Sektöründe öncü bir teknoloji şirketi için Backend Engineer poz., Remote çalışma kapsamında ekip arkadaşları arıyoruz. Teknoloji Stack'imiz (Our Technology Stack) .NET/C#, Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS), Kafka, Azure Service Bus, Redis, MongoDB Atlas, Docker Aranan Nitelikler (Qualifications) 2+ yıl profesyonel yazılım geliştirme tecrübesi C# deneyimi güçlü bir artıdır. Java, Go gibi dillerde yetkin olup C# öğrenmeye ve kullanmaya istekli olmak da yeterlidir Clean code yazmaya tutkulu olmak ve bunu yaparken yazılım prensiplerine hakim olmak OOP'a dair sağlam (SOLID) bir anlayış gereklidir. TDD & DDD prensipleri konusunda temel bilgi bir artıdır Microservices mimarisi ve dağıtık sistemler konusunda temel bilgi bir artıdır Azure, AWS, GCP gibi bulut servislerinden en az biriyle temel düzeyde deneyim Docker deneyimi. Kubernetes deneyimi bir artıdır Kafka, RabbitMQ gibi mesajlaşma servislerine aşinalık/deneyim bir artıdır Git ve kollaboratif geliştirme süreçlerinde güçlü deneyim Güçlü bir ekibin parçası olmak, Milyonlarca kullanıcıya dokunan ürünlerde iz bırakmak, Kariyerinizde yeni bir sıçrama yapmak istiyorsanız… 📩 Başvurularınızı bekliyoruz.

title: Engineering Manager, SAP CAP Node.js
description: We are seeking an experienced Engineering Manager with a strong background in SAP CAP and Node.js to lead our engineering team. This role involves overseeing technical projects, fostering collaboration, and driving innovation while maintaining industry best practices. Responsibilities Conduct code reviews and ensure features adhere to clean code and design principles Monitor applications, troubleshoot issues, and resolve bugs to maintain system integrity Write comprehensive technical and user documentation Collaborate with the team to track performance and address needs effectively Engage with customers and stakeholders to address technical topics and provide metrics to management Participate in the setup, improvement, and execution of development processes Provide architectural and design decisions to guide technical implementations Requirements 7+ years of experience in SAPUI5, BTP, HANA, CAP, Node.js, CI/CD (Jenkins, Piper, Webdriver.io), with a broad technological perspective Proven experience leading teams of 10+ people with a focus on cloud technologies, SAP, architecture, and organizational mentoring Proficiency in design principles and microservice architecture Familiarity with Agile methodologies such as Scrum and Kanban Basic understanding of JavaScript and Node.js Knowledge of SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP), HANA database, and SAP CAP (Java and Node.js) English proficiency at B2 level or higher We offer International projects with top brands Work with global teams of highly skilled, diverse peers Healthcare benefits Employee financial programs Paid time off and sick leave Upskilling, reskilling and certification courses Unlimited access to the LinkedIn Learning library and 22,000+ courses Global career opportunities Volunteer and community involvement opportunities EPAM Employee Groups Award-winning culture recognized by Glassdoor, Newsweek and LinkedIn

title: Senior Frontend Engineer (React)
description: The digital entertainment and iGaming world is entering a new era, driven by rapidly evolving technology and changing user expectations. This shift demands not only strong brands, but also integrated structures capable of leading them under a unified strategy. This is the vision that inspired the creation of NGAMING. Established in 2026 under Doğan Online (DOL), NGAMING is a next-generation group structure bringing together leading brands in digital entertainment and iGaming under one shared mission and strategy. We built NGAMING to be integrated, sustainable, and collectively stronger, enabling brands to grow not individually, but together. Today, through Nesine, atyarışı.com and Liderform, we move forward not only with our individual achievements but as an integrated structure aligned around a common goal. The driving force behind this vision in technology and software is our company, D Yazılım Teknoloji A.Ş. Join a team full of life and become an essential player! Create groundbreaking projects, build new digital worlds, and make your mark! Surprise your competitors with strategic moves, inspire with your speed, and always pass the ball to your team! If you're looking for a tech-driven, innovative, and exciting career where every moment is full of energy and opportunity, you're in the right place. Join NGAMING — and rewrite the game! Full-of-Life Qualities Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. 5+ years of professional experience in JavaScript development, with deep expertise in React (Hooks). Strong experience with Context API and/or Redux for state management. Solid experience working with RESTful APIs. Proven ability to design and develop scalable, reusable, and high-performance frontend architectures. Strong knowledge of JavaScript package managers (Yarn, npm). Hands-on experience with build and bundling tools such as Webpack, Babel, or similar. Strong focus on performance optimization, clean code, and semantic HTML/CSS. Practical understanding of micro frontend and monorepo architectures. A good knowledge of Node.js, SSR & Socket.io. Strong knowledge of frontend monitoring and observability, with hands-on experience using tools such as Sentry, New Relic, etc. for error tracking, performance monitoring and production analysis. Strong awareness of consistent user experience (UX/UI) principles. Extensive experience using Bitbucket for version control (Experience with GitHub or GitLab is considered a plus). Strong advocate of testing and clean code practices ( Hands-on experience with Jest, Testing Library, ESLint, and similar tools). Experience with component-driven development and Storybook / atomic design systems. Experience working with frontend applications deployed on AWS (e.g., S3, CloudFront, CDN strategies, environment-based deployments). Experience building and maintaining large-scale, high-traffic web applications. Comfortable working in Agile / Scrum teams and cross-functional environments. Strong understanding of software engineering best practices across the full SDLC. Strong architectural thinking, problem-solving, and communication skills. Proactive, ownership-driven, and capable of mentoring other team members. A Full Look on the Job Description Own the development, maintenance, and optimization of complex frontend features and applications. Take responsibility throughout the full product lifecycle: design, development, release, and long-term maintenance. Lead and contribute to frontend architectural decisions. Contribute to and improve AWS-based frontend deployment and release processes. Ensure high standards of performance, scalability, security, and code quality. Actively participate in and lead code reviews, providing constructive and high-quality feedback. Support knowledge sharing, technical guidance, and mentoring within the frontend team. Collaborate closely with Product, Design, Backend, and DevOps teams. Continuously evaluate new technologies and propose improvements to existing systems. Build high-performance frontend applications serving millions of users. Full-of-Life Benefits: “Employee benefits” but it’s also known as “Full-of-Life Benefits” in the world of NGAMING🙂 Private health insurance with unlimited coverage extending to spouse and children, A multinet restaurant ticket, Transportation benefits on office working days, In addition to annual leave days, you have three Won’t Make It Today 🙂 days, which you can use whenever you like (we simply call this BAY 🙂) An additional one-day birthday leave to redeem on any day during your birthday week, Gift vouchers on holidays, Gifts on special occasions, including marriage and child birth, Shop as you wish throughout the year with gift transfers to your Digital Wallet! Follow NGAMING on LinkedIn to discover our high-spirited, full-of-life team! Bu ilan sebebiyle yapacağınız başvurular aracılığıyla toplanacak kişisel verileriniz veri sorumluları NGAMING markası grup şirketleri D Elektronik Şans Oyunları ve Yayıncılık A.Ş., 4 Race Teknoloji ve Yazılım A.Ş., D Yazılım Teknoloji A.Ş., Liderform At Yarışları Enformasyon Anonim Şirketi tarafından 6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu ve ilgili mevzuat kapsamında iş başvuru süreçlerinin yürütülmesi amacıyla işlenecektir. Kişisel verilerinize ve haklarınıza ilişkin detaylı bilgi için lütfen Çalışan Adayı Aydınlatma Metnimizi inceleyiniz.

title: Senior React Native & React JS Developer
company: TABPAD Pos, Tablet Menü, Qr Menü Sistemleri
description: Kariyer Yolculuğuna Davetlisiniz Tabpad, sadece bir iş yerine giriş kapısı değil, aynı zamanda bir kariyer yolculuğunun başlangıcıdır. Biz, sadece işler yapmıyoruz, aynı zamanda birlikte büyüyerek ve öğrenerek yol alıyoruz. Ekibimize katılarak, siz de bu heyecan verici yolculuğun bir parçası olabilirsiniz. Birlikte Yaratıcı Olalım Tabpad'de kariyer yaparken, sınırları zorlamak, yenilikçi fikirler geliştirmek ve birlikte yaratıcı olmak için fırsatlarla dolu bir ortam bulacaksınız. Biz, sıradanlıktan uzak, yaratıcı düşünceye değer veren bir ekibiz. Siz de bu ekibin bir parçası olun ve fikirlerinizi hayata geçirme fırsatını yakalayın. Değerlendirme ve Gelişim Tabpad'de, her bir çalışanın kariyerini şekillendirmesine ve kişisel olarak büyümesine olanak tanıyan bir ortam sağlıyoruz. Performansınızı değerlendirirken, güçlü yönlerinizi vurgulamak ve gelişim alanlarınızı belirlemek için size destek oluyoruz. Kendinizi geliştirmek ve kariyerinizde ilerlemek için ihtiyacınız olan kaynakları size sunuyoruz.

title: Backend Developer
description: Dijital Güvenlik Sektöründe Kariyer Fırsatı! Sen de dijital güvenlik sektöründe kariyer yapmak ve parlak bir geleceğe adım atmak ister misin? ArkSigner, e-imza ve Kimlik Doğrulama çözümleriyle teknoloji sektöründe lider konumda olan dinamik bir şirkettir. 2015 yılında başlayan yolculuğumuz bugün Türkiye’nin en büyük bankaları, holdingleri, finans kuruluşları ve kamu kurumlarıyla devam ediyor. Yazılım ve donanım ürünlerimizle dijital güvenlik alanında yeni standartlar belirlemeyi amaçlıyoruz. Tüm mevzuatlara uygun, yerli imkanlarla geliştirilmiş elektronik imza ve kimlik doğrulama çözümlerimizle Türkiye’de ve globalde güvenliği yeniden tanımlıyoruz. Buradan hareketle şirketimizin Ankara ofisinde görevlendirilmek üzere çalışma arkadaşımızı ekibimize katılmaya davet ediyoruz! Aranan Nitelikler: Üniversitelerin Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerinden mezun, .NET teknolojileriyle yazılım geliştirme konusunda 3-4 yıl deneyimli, C# ile hem .NET Framework 4.7.2 hem de .NET Core 6.0 / 8.0 / 9.0 sürümlerinde uygulama geliştirmiş, MSSQL veritabanı, LINQ to Entity ve Entity Framework konularında deneyimli, REST API ve SOAP servisleri geliştirme ve entegrasyonu konularında bilgi sahibi, MVC mimarisi ile çalışmış, JavaScript ve jQuery konularında tecrübeli, SOLID prensipleri ve Nesne Yönelimli Programlama (OOP) konularına hakim, Design patterns (tasarım desenleri) konusunda uygulama tecrübesi olan, RabbitMQ ve Redis ile mesajlaşma ve önbellekleme sistemlerinde çalışmış, Windows Services geliştirme ve yönetimi konularında deneyim sahibi.
